voice: Our tone is grounded and clear, prioritizing transparency and scientific insight over fleeting trends. We communicate the essence of our botanical ingredients with quiet confidence, always respecting the user's intelligence.
logo_style_brief: A refined lowercase wordmark, clean and elegant, subtly paired with a small, abstract leaf or water droplet glyph that evokes natural purity and scientific precision.
photo_style_tokens: soft beige studio sweep, gentle natural shadow, botanical hints, luxe minimalism

facts_from_brief.Deliverables: • Print-ready artwork in CMYK (PDF) • Editable source files • A quick mock-up showing how the labels sit on at least one jar and one bottle
facts_from_brief.Client will supply: product names, mandatory copy, and die-line measurements
facts_from_brief.Desired feel: cohesive with a modern cosmetics brand; premium yet approachable
facts_from_brief.Label requirements: professionally-designed, polished on shelves, consistent across different containers, room for ingredient disclosures and regulatory text

invented: Specific hex codes for the color palette
Specific phrasing for the brand voice
Interpretation of 'small leaf/droplet glyph' for the logo
Interpretation of 'soft beige studio sweep, gentle natural shadow, botanical hints, luxe minimalism' for photo style
Product line examples: one face-cream JAR and one serum pump BOTTLE to fulfill mockup requirements
